allowedFamilies.name: bounded-route-inspection

deniedPatterns: absolute home paths, secret files, app execution, and unbounded traversal

constraints: Remain inside the declared project scope.
Exclude secret-bearing, generated, dependency, build, and runtime-output paths.

allowedFamilies.name: git-identity-inspection

deniedPatterns: all Git mutation and publication subcommands

constraints: Allow only read-only repository identity and branch-state inspection.

allowedFamilies.name: route-trace-renderer

deniedPatterns: builds, tests, dev servers, URL probing, app execution, deployment, migration, and package installation

constraints: The renderer must remain static and read-only.
Do not treat renderer output as runtime availability evidence.

approvalExceptions: A named-file approval may permit one otherwise excluded non-mutating static read when the file is not secret-bearing.
